caveat: This is a DETERMINISTIC-PATH-ONLY slice (Phase 4 D8). The fixtures distill the bench's near-duplicate 'newer-supersedes-older' STRUCTURE and its expected_doc_ids citation ground truth into the fields the deterministic normalizer consumes (titles, bodies, the conflicting entity/state). We do NOT run the bench's full LLM-judge harness (correctness x completeness, three-judge consensus) -- we take its labels, not its scorer. A paraphrased-only conflict the deterministic normalizer cannot see (pair 5, catchable=false) is honestly counted as a miss; the recall threshold in the test is set to the deterministic-normalizer ceiling and documented. The Bonsai semantic adjudicator is exercised separately in tests/test_contradiction.py via FakeDecider + the live dogfood step.

pairs.miss_reason: Paraphrased-only conflict with no field-style 'key: value' / 'key is value' shape the deterministic normalizer recognizes; Bonsai's has_state relation (out of scope for the deterministic-only slice) would catch it. Honestly counted as a deterministic miss.
